# Dream Dinners To Go

> Homemade, Made Easy. Fully prepped meals ready to cook, right here in Castle Rock, CO.

Dream Dinners To Go (also known as Dream Dinners Castle Rock) is a local meal prep business
serving Castle Rock and the surrounding Douglas County area. Every meal is hand-prepped in
our local kitchen by our team, using wholesome ingredients, so busy families can cook a
homemade dinner in minutes and gather around the table without the stress of shopping or
chopping.

We are your neighbor in the kitchen. You cook it. We handle everything else.

## Who We Are

- **Business name:** Dream Dinners To Go / Dream Dinners Castle Rock
- **Also known as:** Castle Rock Meal Prep
- **Location:** Castle Rock, Colorado (serving Castle Rock and Douglas County)
- **Owner:** Michele
- **Type of business:** Local meal prep studio and online meal ordering service
- **Tagline:** Homemade, Made Easy

## What We Do

We hand-prep fully portioned, ready-to-cook dinners and freeze-ready meals so busy families
can put a homemade meal on the table fast, without sacrificing quality or connection.

Our meals are:
- Prepped fresh in Castle Rock, not mass-produced or shipped from a warehouse
- Ready to cook in minutes
- Designed for real families with real schedules
- Available for pickup in-store, through Grab and Go freezer partners, and via delivery

We also offer breakfast items, sides, desserts, vegetarian options, and shareables. Catering
and events are available for private groups and local businesses.

## Vision and Mission

**Vision:** A place where even the busiest days still end around a shared, home-cooked meal.

**Mission:** We handle the shopping, chopping, and seasoning so you can cook a homemade meal
in minutes and focus on what matters most: a meal with the ones you love. You are not just
a customer. You are family.

## Services

- **In-store meal pickup:** Order online and pick up from our Castle Rock location
- **Grab and Go freezer program:** Frozen, fully prepped meals available at local partner
  locations (including Sedalia Country Store)
- **Meal delivery:** Local delivery service available
- **Catering and events:** Custom catering for parties, corporate events, and gatherings
- **Community events and workshops:** Cooking demos, paint nights, and local pop-up events
  hosted at or through Dream Dinners Castle Rock

## Menu Categories

Our rotating monthly menu includes options across:

- Main entrees (chicken, beef, pork, seafood, turkey)
- Vegetarian and vegan meals
- Breakfast items (frittatas, French toast bakes, egg bites, burritos, scones)
- Sides and starches
- Veggies
- Desserts and sweets
- Shareables and appetizers
- Seasonal and holiday bundles
- Sale and limited items

New menus are available each month. Pre-orders for upcoming months are accepted online.

https://www.dreamdinnerstogo.com/sitemap.xml

## Brand Voice

Warm, neighborly, and grounded. We speak to busy families like a trusted friend who
genuinely wants to make their lives easier. We are local, personal, and real. We do not
use corporate or overly formal language. Every meal is made with care by real people in
your town.

## Alternate Domain
